overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring post-apocalyptic desert ruins during golden hour. The character walks through sandy terrain past ruined buildings and palm trees, approaching a large ruined complex with mountains visible in the distance.

events.description: begins walking alongside large ruined colosseum structure with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through desert terrain alongside a massive ruined building, carrying a bow on her back

entered.detail: large circular ruined structure with multiple arches and broken upper levels
tall palm tree with green fronds against the sunset sky
sandy terrain with scattered dry grass and small rocks
distant ruined industrial complex with tall spires and broken towers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a red-haired character walking through a desert landscape at sunset. A massive ruined colosseum-like building dominates the left side while palm trees stand on the right. The character moves steadily forward on sandy ground toward distant ruins visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert approaching ruined tower complex

events.description: passes the colosseum building and enters open desert with clear view of central ruins
begins turning right to approach the ruined tower structures

agents.ego_description: walking across open desert dunes toward a large ruined complex, adjusting direction to approach the towers

entered.detail: tall stone tower ruins with broken walls and exposed wooden beams
collapsed wooden scaffolding and platform ruins
scattered dry bushes and desert grasses

segments.scene_description: Having passed the initial colosseum structure, the character traverses open desert dunes toward a massive ruined complex. The camera follows as the character approaches towering stone ruins with wooden scaffolding, turning slightly to navigate around the structures. Sparse desert vegetation dots the sandy landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined tower complex with wooden scaffolding

events.description: turns left around the base of a tall ruined tower
ascends a sandy slope revealing distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: navigating around the ruined towers and wooden structures, moving up a sandy incline

entered.detail: tall green cactus plants with segmented arms
rolling sand dunes with wind-sculpted ridges

segments.scene_description: The character explores the immediate vicinity of the ruined towers, walking past wooden scaffolding and stone walls. Desert cacti appear in the foreground as the character circles the structures. The segment ends with the character ascending a sandy slope, revealing a sweeping view of distant mountains bathed in golden sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert vista with mountain backdrop

events.description: reaches open desert overlook with panoramic mountain view at sunset

agents.ego_description: walking through open desert toward a distant ruined palace structure with mountains in the background

entered.detail: elongated ruined building with multiple spires and ornate architecture on a raised dune

segments.scene_description: The final segment showcases an expansive desert vista with majestic mountains silhouetted against the golden sunset sky. The character moves through open terrain toward a ruined palace-like structure perched on a dune. The camera captures the sweeping landscape with sparse vegetation and the dramatic mountain backdrop dominating the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert landscape that evolves from a walk past isolated ruins into an expansive vista of mountains at sunset. It begins by following a red-haired character moving along sandy ground between a massive colosseum-like building and a cluster of palm trees. As the character leaves the initial structure behind, the scene opens into wide desert dunes and shifts toward a towering ruined complex reinforced with wooden scaffolding. The camera then circles these stone walls and desert cacti before ascending a sandy slope, which gradually reveals a sweeping view of the horizon. Finally, the perspective expands across a majestic desert vista, moving toward a ruined palace-like structure silhouetted against distant mountains bathed in golden sunset light.
